offer: For property managers managing 5–15 properties/month, missed lease renewals cause cash flow gaps. We automate renewal reminders instead of manual tracking of lease dates using spreadsheets or calendars.
problem: Difficulty in tracking lease expiry dates and scheduling renewals.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums sharing property management tools
try_it: Let users extract lease expiry dates and send reminders
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
CSV import for existing lease data
